chattabsconfig.title: Chat Tabs Config
chattabsconfig.enabled.tooltip: The master toggle button for the entire mod
chattabsconfig.maxlines.tooltip: How many lines are saved in the chat history. Minecraft default is 100.
chattabsconfig.textshadow.tooltip: Should the chat text have a shadow. Minecraft default is true.
chattabsconfig.bgcolor.tooltip: The background color of chat lines.
chattabsconfig.autogeneratemsgtabs.toolt: Automatically creates a tab for every DM you receive.
chattabsconfig.bgcolorhovered.tooltip: The background color of chat lines when your mouse is hovered over them.
chattabsconfig.chattab.name: Name
chattabsconfig.chattab.filter.regex.tool: If "Filter DMs" is true, this option is used for the name of the player who's DMs you want to be filtered. Otherwise, it is used as a regex on the chat line.
chattabsconfig.selectedtabcolor.tooltip: The Color of the tab selection indicator.
chattabsconfig.unreadcolor.tooltip: The color of the unread messages indicator.
chattabsconfig.clearhistory.tooltip:
Enabled: Clear chat when switching servers (Default Minecraft behavior)
Disabled: Chat messages will persist when switching servers
